# Simulation Software

**Summary**: Computational software used to model and simulate the behavior of fluids in industrial systems.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-khalid|Khalid, 2023]] used PIPESIM to simulate gas network performance under various hydrogen blending ratios.
